name: @regunav/sector-packs-core
description: Canonical Sector Pack schema + manifest registry + loader (Layer 1+2+3+4 bundle from the 8-Layer Spine — Profile + Rule Pack + Dictionary + Manifest assembled per vertical industry). One pack = one installable / billable / certifiable unit per sector. Maritime, hospitals, banking, etc. each ship as their own pack.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp -r packs dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
